title.raw: LounGenie Features | QR Ordering, Safe, Charging and Guest Amenities
title.rendered: LounGenie Features | QR Ordering, Safe, Charging and Guest Amenities

content.raw:
Features

ORDER. STASH. CHARGE. CHILL. In One Unit.

The LounGenie solves the four friction points that cost pool operators the most revenue, right at the guest’s seat, in one commercial-grade unit with zero upfront cost.

$0 Upfront Cost Solar-Powered Charging PoolSafe Installs & Services
ORDER

QR ordering at the seat, with dedicated staff alerts.

The Problem

Every time a guest walks to the bar to order, you lose a cabana rental minute and a potential upsell. Your staff can’t cover every lounge chair fast enough during peak hours.

The Solution

Guests scan a QR code to order food and drinks and the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A built-in service call button sends a separate alert to the staff touchscreen showing exactly which cabana needs attention. No app download. No POS integration. No added labor.

STASH

A waterproof safe that keeps guests on the deck.

The Problem

Guests drape towels over their belongings and glance back every five minutes. Some skip the pool entirely. Cabana dwell time drops — and so does your per-guest spend.

The Solution

A waterproof safe with a waterproof keypad lets guests lock phones, wallets, and room keys inside the cabana. When guests feel secure, they swim, relax, and stay on the deck far longer. Properties consistently report that STASH is the single feature guests mention most in reviews.

CHARGE

Solar-powered charging — no wiring, no permits.

The Problem

A dead phone means no mobile ordering, no social media posts tagging your property, and no digital room key access. Guests with dying batteries leave the pool to find an outlet — and often don’t come back.

The Solution

Solar panels power the USB charging ports from sunrise to sunset — no wiring, no permits, no electricity cost. When guests can charge poolside, they stop leaving the pool area. And when they stay, they order.

CHILL

Cold drinks at arm’s reach all afternoon.

The Problem

When a guest’s drink gets warm, they have two choices: walk to the bar for a new one or settle for what they have. Either way, you lose an impulse purchase.

The Solution

A removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold at the seat for hours. Cold drinks within arm’s reach encourage high-margin repeat beverage orders throughout the afternoon — without a server needing to check in.

Configurations

Three configurations to match your operations.

Classic

Secure storage + comfort

Waterproof safe, solar USB charging, and removable ice bucket. A practical entry point that solves the most common reasons guests leave the deck early.

F&B Communication Button

Staff alert system included

Everything in Classic, plus a service call button that routes alerts to a dedicated touchscreen monitor — so staff know exactly which cabana needs attention.

2.0

Full QR ordering capability

The most complete configuration. QR codes at the seat print orders on a dedicated PoolSafe printer. Combines every feature of the Classic and F&B Communication models into one seamless guest experience.

In Their Own Words

What operators say after deploying the LounGenie.

“Our guests now feel they can safely secure their items in the Pool Safe, and the Food & Beverage call button for service has enhanced our poolside experience by improving service response times.”

Kamiya Woodard
Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott

“Since launch, we have far exceeded our budgeted goals, and the revenue share has been the largest part of that success.”

Raymond Weissert
Director of Operations, The Grove Resort & Waterpark

Zero Upfront Cost

We install the LounGenie. We service it. You keep the revenue.

PoolSafe handles the hardware, flies to your property for installation, and manages all ongoing service. Your property earns incremental F&B revenue from Day 1.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection
